description: fetchBillingCycle retries the billing-service call with exponential backoff; fetchStatusBadge and fetchOrgTier make a single call and let any failure propagate.

findings.rationale: fetchBillingCycle wraps the service call in a retry-with-backoff loop that fetchStatusBadge and fetchOrgTier lack. The loop is load-bearing: this path is on the invoice-issuance critical path where transient failures translate directly to revenue leakage. An agent that normalises the three onto a shared helper will drop the retry loop unless warned.
